meaning: adj.鸽的,鸽似的,鸽色的n.耧斗菜
examples: There are some big clumps o' columbine in th' garden.
Columbine matches the purple of delphiniums under the cherry tree.
The guy who shot up Dawson College in Quebec last year played Super Columbine.
Among the cottages, the three-bedroom Columbine has spectacular panoramas over the Elk River valley.
Earlier Thursday, school officials announced that Columbine High, in suburban Denver, would be closed indefinitely.
